---
title: ""
---

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%" style="text-align: center;"}

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.align='center', out.width='80%'}
knitr::include_graphics("/Users/samridhipurohit/Downloads/Data555/Website/images/Samridhi_Headshot.jpeg")
```

## Samridhi Purohit

:::

::: {.column width="50%" style="text-align: left;"}

Hi, welcome to my Website. Add a [link](https://google.com) so we can see behavior later. 

:::
